steps.title: Read activity 3
steps.content: The graph's horizontal axis lists the activities. Find activity $3$, then read the height of its bar on the vertical axis.

steps.title: Use the answer choices to estimate
steps.content: The activity $3$ bar is between $35$ and $40$ students. Among the choices, only $39$ falls in that interval.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A, $25$, is below the bar for activity $3$.
  • Choice B, $39$, matches the bar height. Correct.
  • Choice C, $48$, is the count for activity $5$, not activity $3$.
  • Choice D, $50$, is above the activity $3$ bar.
That matches choice B.
